title: Mona Offshore Wind Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for an offshore wind farm with up to 96 wind turbines with an output of over 350 megawatts (MW) of renewable energy and up to 4 offshore substation platforms which would be located in the east Irish Sea; and landfall on the North Wales coastline with onshore export cables connecting to the proposed onshore substation with a connection to the Bodelwyddan National Grid substation.  Date of decision:  4 July 2025  Company / location:   Mona Offshore Wind LimitedSunbury On ThamesMiddlesexEngland   Type of project:  Development consent order for an offshore wind farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Minimum output:  350 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
